overview: International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad (IIIT Hyderabad), established in 1998 and located on Professor CR Rao Road, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana, is a premier autonomous deemed university focused on advanced research and technical education. Founded as India’s first non-profit public-private partnership (N-PPP) technical institute, IIIT Hyderabad is globally recognized for excellence in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronics, and interdisciplinary research-driven education.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Accredited; Autonomous Deemed University recognized by the University Grants Commission (UGC).

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹2,25,000 – ₹2,50,000 per semester (₹4,50,000 – ₹5,00,000 per year). Hostel Fee: ₹24,000 per semester. Mess Fee: ₹30,000 per semester.
₹2,00,000 per semester (₹4,00,000 per year). Hostel and mess charges additional as applicable.
₹2,00,000 per semester. Research assistantships available for eligible scholars.

placements.placementRate: Overall: 96.14%; B.Tech CSE: 99.15%; B.Tech ECE: 97.22%; Dual Degree Programs: 100%
placements.totalOffers: 374 students placed out of 389 registered candidates during 2025 placement cycle
placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Adobe, Goldman Sachs, Apple, Deloitte, Uber, Walmart, Oracle
placements.internationalOffers: Multiple high-value international and global remote offers including packages exceeding ₹1 Crore

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through multiple national-level entrance channels including JEE Main, UGEE, PGEE, GATE, Olympiad-based admissions, and special admission modes depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules generally follow JEE Main, UGEE, and PGEE annual examination timelines.

campus.specialNote: On-campus residence is mandatory for all regular undergraduate and postgraduate students. The institute operates four specialized cooperative vegetarian kitchens and maintains a highly research-oriented academic environment.

contact.address: International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad, Professor CR Rao Road, Gachibowli, Hyderabad – 500032, Telangana, India

financialAid: Research Assistantships for Dual Degree and PhD Scholars
scholarships.specialNote: No automatic caste-based tuition waivers are available due to the institute’s self-sustaining non-grant operational model.
